title: Nooraandukku Oru Murai Lyrics Thaayin Manikodi
stanzas: <div>Nooraandukku Oru Murai Song Lyrics Thaayin Manikodi

nooraandukku oru murai
pookkindra poovallavaa.
indha poovukku sevagam
seibavan naanallavaa.

idhazhodu idhazh serthu
uyirodu uyir korthu
vaazha vaa..

nooraandukku oru murai
pookkindra poovallavaa.
indha poovukku sevagam
seibavan nee allavaa.

kannaalane kannaalane
un kannile ennai kanden.
kanmoodinaal kanmoodinaal
anneramum unnai kanden.

oru viral ennai thodugayil
uyir niraigiren azhagaa.
maru viral vandhu thodugayil
vittu vilaguthal azhagaa.

uyir kondu vaazhum
naal varai
indha uravugal
vendum mannavaa..

nooraandukku oru murai
pookkindra poovallavaa.
indha poovukku sevagam
seibavan nee allavaa.

idhe sugam idhe sugam
ennaalume kandaal enna.
innerame innerame
en jeevanum ponaal enna.

muthathile pala vagai undu
indru sollattumaa kanakku.
ippadiye ennai kattikkollu
mella vidiyattum kizhakku.

nooraandukku oru murai
pookkindra poovallavaa.
indha poovukku sevagam
seibavan nee allavaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and devotion, highlighting the beauty of romantic connections.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Thaayin Manikodi.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Devi and Gopal Sharma.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was this song released?

This song was released on August 29, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nooraandukku Oru Murai, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song captures the essence of devotion, as the singers express their heartfelt feelings through soothing melodies. Set against the backdrop of Thaayin Manikodi, it enhances the narrative of love within the film. The enchanting composition and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a cherished classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nooraandukku Oru Murai from Thaayin Manikodi is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With its soothing lyrics and enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The collaboration of talented artists brings a unique charm that makes this track unforgettable.
stanzaMeanings: Nooraandukku Oru Murai Song Lyrics Thaayin Manikodi
Is this flower blooming for the hundredth time? Am I not the one who serves this flower?
Come and live, joining life with life, taking away the essence of life.
Is this flower blooming for the hundredth time? Aren't you the one who serves this flower?
Oh dear, oh dear, I saw myself in your eyes. With love, with love, I saw you every moment.
One finger touches me, and I feel beautiful. When another finger touches, it feels beautiful to let go.
Until the day I live with my soul, these relationships are needed, my dear.
Is this flower blooming for the hundredth time? Aren't you the one who serves this flower?
This is happiness, this is happiness, what do I see in it? If my soul leaves, what will happen to me?
There are many kinds of pearls, shall I tell you today? Just like this, let me be caught, slowly let the dawn rise in the east.
Don't say no, there is a woman in my being, there is a truth.
Is this flower blooming for the hundredth time? Aren't you the one who serves this flower?
Come and live, joining life with life, taking away the essence of life.
Is this flower blooming for the hundredth time? Aren't you the one who serves this flower?
